reviews.review_text:
Loved our stay overnight camping but it just wasnt long enough for us we should have stayed longer!! It had everything we needed. Running toilet, hot water showers, free firewood and fireplace. The large campsite was more than big enough for our tent, car and awning could definitely fit more people for sure.
Could see heaps of stars in the skies, lovely afternoon sun on campsite when we arrived. Bit costly is all I say thats why 4 stars

Very nice and quite place for camping and relaxing, close to the beach and Green patch, with facilities including toilets, bathrooms and barbecues, no electricity in-site for phone chargers, etc, and camp sites are too packed but it was totally great experience. Recommended
Fantastic campground with large, clear sites, great hot water showers, clean toilets and very easy access to the three nearby beaches. Plenty of birds and wildlife to follow around and/or avoid!
Amazing place!!!

Everything was good
Love it 😀
Very nice camping, the natural park and the beach at walking distance are incredible. We even had a few kangaroos visit our camp in the morning!

We took the max prices one that gave us good space to park our car and camp besides it. Fire wood was available at site free of charge, but you need kindling wood to start the fire. Rest of the other amenities were neat and clean.
My first time I've done a camping it's was great.

No picnic tables or firepits in your campsite, all camping spots on top of each other. Mens Bathouse dirty n showers stopped working. In the middle of the week!  All for $70 a night for a piece of flat ground. Surrounding area beautiful.
Great spot, and just a short walk to the beach

This is probably the best review you get. Due to the place being so popular there's always random trash laying around. Police and officials visit the camp site on daily. Every 2days or so the garbage truck wakes u up at 5am. And leaf blowers cleaning around every now n then.
But still it's an amazing place. The rangers are doing a great job.
It's just not a raw camping experience where you expect silence and no crowds
Crazy price. Just pay for a hotel
Great campground with facilities.hot shower, restrooms, washing up sink
Are you crazy? 100$???
Is too expensive, they don’t have power. The hot water is not working well, but the place is awesome
Beautiful beach
Returned here after 25years and still magical. Clean, fire place, hot showers, beautiful visitors, wildlife, shops close by and the beach is amazing

Great location, amenities and proximity to car parking.
Biggest negative is that they are relatively small campsites and very close to each other (most sites are about 3-5m away from other sites).

This beach is as good as any I've seen around Australia. The campsites are large, well drained and mostly level. Great amenities blocks with solar powered hot water and washing up sinks. Plenty of shade. Each site has a firepit with bbq plate and picnic table. Quiet and surrounded by nature. Great service at the ranger station. Highly recommended.

Beautiful camping area with great facilities. Hot showers, restrooms, fire pits with hotplate. No power. The spots are limited, but most are large enough for several tents. A short stroll to Bristol Point Beach and a slightly longer stroll to Green Patch. A convenient shopping village just up the road and close to Husskison and Vincentia for more shopping options.
Peaceful beautiful and so relaxing weekend
Huge sites. Could fit 4 tents or more! Great wildlife, clean bathrooms.  Short walk to Green patch Beach. Hidden gem
Always amazing. Good facilities. Great campsites 😊
